text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: A SystemAdmin is always a registered Member.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Producer is the general role a Member plays inside a ProductionCompany: Founder, Owner, or Manager.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Ownership is a strict acyclic tree: every Owner has at most one appointer; the Founder is the root and has none. An Owner appoints Managers and may alter their Permissions.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: A non-closed ProductionCompany must always have at least one Owner.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: A buyer (Guest or Member) may hold at most one ActiveOrder per Event at any moment. Reserved Tickets are temporarily locked from the Event inventory.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 10px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 10px; text-align: center;
